parameters.jsCode:
const formData = $input.all()[0].json.body || $input.all()[0].json;

const intake = {
  client_name: formData.client_name || formData.company_name || formData.businessName || 'Unknown',
  contact_name: formData.contact_name || formData.ownerName || '',
  contact_title: formData.contact_title || '',
  contact_email: formData.contact_email || formData.email || '',
  industry: formData.industry || '',
  q01_workflow_name: formData.q01_workflow_name || formData.workflow_name || formData.process_name || '',
  q02_trigger_event: formData.q02_trigger_event || formData.trigger_event || '',
  q03_business_objective: formData.q03_business_objective || formData.business_objective || formData.objective || '',
  q04_end_condition: formData.q04_end_condition || formData.end_condition || '',
  q05_outcome_owner: formData.q05_outcome_owner || formData.outcome_owner || '',
  q06_runs_per_period: parseInt(formData.q06_runs_per_period || formData.volume || formData.runs_per_period || 50),
  q06_period_unit: formData.q06_period_unit || formData.period_unit || 'day',
  q07_avg_trigger_to_end: parseInt(formData.q07_avg_trigger_to_end || formData.time_per_item || 15),
  q07_time_unit: formData.q07_time_unit || formData.time_unit || 'minutes',
  q08_worst_case_delay: parseInt(formData.q08_worst_case_delay || formData.worst_case_delay || 0),
  q08_delay_unit: formData.q08_delay_unit || formData.delay_unit || 'hours',
  q09_business_hours: formData.q09_business_hours || 'standard',
  q10_systems_involved: Array.isArray(formData.q10_systems_involved)
    ? formData.q10_systems_involved
    : (formData.systems_involved || formData.systems || '').split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean),
  q10_systems_other: formData.q10_systems_other || '',
  q11_manual_transfers: formData.q11_manual_transfers || '',
  q12_human_decisions: formData.q12_human_decisions || '',
  q13_common_failures: formData.q13_common_failures || formData.common_failures || '',
  q14_failure_cost: formData.q14_failure_cost || formData.failure_cost || '',
  hourly_rate: parseInt(formData.hourly_rate || 50),
  q15_priority: formData.q15_priority || formData.priority || '',
  budget_range: formData.budget_range || '',
  timeline_weeks: formData.timeline_weeks || formData.timeline || '',
  decision_maker: formData.decision_maker || 'no',
  lead_source: formData.lead_source || 'web',
  urgency: formData.urgency || 'medium',
  competitors: formData.competitors || 'no',
  previous_automation: formData.previous_automation || 'no'
};

const cleanIntake = Object.fromEntries(
  Object.entries(intake).filter(([_, v]) => v !== '' && v !== 0 && !(Array.isArray(v) && v.length === 0))
);

return {
  json: {
    intake: cleanIntake,
    intakeJson: JSON.stringify(cleanIntake),
    contact_email: cleanIntake.contact_email || ''
  }
};
